title: rubus tereticaulis var. fragilipes
intro: Rubus tereticaulis var. fragilipes, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a type of woody vine native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus tereticaulis var. fragilipes include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
